title: Recipe For A Waiter:
content:
Stuff a hired dress-suit case with an effort to please,
        Add a half-dozen stumbles and trips;
     Remove his right thumb from the cranberry sauce,
        Roll in crumbs, melted butter and tips.

        - Life.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Recipe For A Waiter:"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
